scope.dependency_radius: Entry and navigation docs only; use this task to define and apply document responsibility boundaries before detailed stale-link cleanup.
constraints: README files explain the purpose, scope, and usage of their containing folder.
INDEX files own file and directory inventories, including per-file or per-directory descriptions.
Avoid duplicating the same file catalog in both README and INDEX.
Do not remove navigation value; move catalog details to INDEX when needed.
non_goals: Do not perform full .ai language normalization in this task.
Do not settle specs or operations canonical truth contracts here.
Do not rewrite unrelated guide content.

review_findings: README and INDEX responsibilities are currently mixed in several entry docs.
User requested README to explain folder resource purpose only, with file/directory catalogs and descriptions centralized in INDEX files.
user_constraints: INDEX owns file and directory catalog descriptions.

steps: Inventory README files that contain detailed file or directory catalogs.
Inventory nearby INDEX files and identify missing INDEX targets if a catalog must be moved.
Move or summarize catalog details so README stays purpose-focused and INDEX owns listings.
Update later remediation tasks if their target docs depend on this boundary.
validation: rg -n -uu "\| Path \||File & Directory Index|File and Directory Index|目錄|檔案" .ai .dev -g "README.md" -g "README.MD"
